message:
fix(node): cap slash BPS at 100% and clamp oracle quorum to [1,100]

staking_governance.rs:
- Cap slash_fraction_bps at 10,000 (100%) before computing penalty amount and
  hash. Previously, a tier policy with bps > 10,000 would produce a slash
  amount exceeding the stake balance and a penalty hash that disagreed with
  the effective penalty. Now both amount and hash use the same effective_bps
  value capped at 10,000.
- New test: test_compute_penalty_caps_bps_and_hashes_effective_value verifies
  that 15,000 bps caps to 100% slash and hash reflects the capped value.

nversion_oracle.rs (INV-NVO-QUORUM):
- Clamp quorum_threshold_percent to [1, 100] in constructor. Zero percent
  would make quorum trivially reachable (0 votes needed); values > 100 would
  make quorum unreachable even with unanimous votes.
- New tests: oracle_creation_clamps_quorum_threshold_bounds (0→1, 255→100)
  and over_100_input_is_clamped_to_unanimous_quorum (verifies 255 behaves
  as unanimous 100% quorum requiring all 3 of 3 votes).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
